entity.summary: Institutional RFQ and OTC trading venue combining authenticated quote and trade coordination with HTLC-based atomic settlement across supported blockchain networks.
entity.notes: First-party SDK and architecture documentation describe the Hashlock Markets RFQ, quote, trade, and HTLC-settlement lifecycle, including web-app and programmatic trading surfaces. HEI uses hybrid because quote discovery and authenticated trade coordination use a backend service while settlement is performed through on-chain HTLC mechanisms. The first-party domain is preserved as live_unverified because full website availability was not independently confirmed in this review pass.

evidence.title: HashLock SDK README
evidence.notes: First-party SDK documentation identifies HashLock as institutional OTC trading with HTLC atomic settlement and documents RFQ creation, quote submission and acceptance, trade creation, authentication, and settlement flows.

evidence.title: Hashlock SDK architecture
evidence.notes: First-party architecture reference, verified against main as of 2026-05-30, documents the same RFQ to quote to trade to HTLC-settlement lifecycle used by the web application and SDK clients.

evidence.title: Hashlock Markets DEX volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current DEX-volume adapter implementation tracks Hashlock Markets HTLC trade legs on Ethereum and Sui and references deployed mainnet contracts, corroborating active on-chain settlement infrastructure.
